claims.title: Policy gate blocks high-risk live path before completion
claims.whyItMatters: Prevents unsafe autonomous execution on sensitive actions.
claims.howTested: Run live discharge workflow and assert blocked state with approval ticket.

claims.title: Human approval unlocks workflow continuation
claims.whyItMatters: Demonstrates governance without disabling automation entirely.
claims.howTested: Approve pending ticket and verify workflow transitions to completed.

claims.title: Execution graph remains deterministic and replayable
claims.whyItMatters: Allows post-incident replay and operational predictability.
claims.howTested: Query graph endpoint and verify stage chain.

claims.title: Every major action is evidence-linked in audit trail
claims.whyItMatters: Enables compliance review and forensic response.
claims.howTested: List audit events and verify evidence IDs are present.

claims.title: Signed connector registry exposes enterprise connectors including Linear
claims.whyItMatters: Validates enterprise integration depth and controlled connector onboarding.
claims.howTested: Query published manifests and assert required reference connectors exist.

claims.title: Tool runtime guard blocks unauthorized execution paths
claims.whyItMatters: Prevents direct tool bypass even when model output attempts unsafe actions.
claims.howTested: Invoke tool execution without required approval and assert blocked response.

claims.title: Tool execution supports idempotent retries
claims.whyItMatters: Improves reliability for enterprise automation retries and outage recovery.
claims.howTested: Submit duplicate tool call with same idempotency key and assert replay semantics.
